claim: Run 1 of toy-bulk-write-v1 against model-y@2026-05, scored by the deterministic field-diff ruler: 18 of 20 cases pass, 2 score dropped_field.

evidence.detail: Synthetic fixture data. Aggregate of the deterministic field-diff scorer over run 1 (20 cases).

claim: Run 2 of toy-bulk-write-v1 against model-y@2026-05, scored by the deterministic field-diff ruler: 17 of 20 cases pass, 3 score dropped_field.

evidence.detail: Synthetic fixture data. Aggregate of the deterministic field-diff scorer over run 2 (20 cases).

claim: Run 3 of toy-bulk-write-v1 against model-y@2026-05, scored by the deterministic field-diff ruler: 18 of 20 cases pass, 2 score dropped_field.

evidence.detail: Synthetic fixture data. Aggregate of the deterministic field-diff scorer over run 3 (20 cases).

claim: Run 1 of toy-bulk-write-v1 against model-y@2026-05, scored by the basic LLM judge: 18 of 20 cases pass, 2 score dropped_field, agreeing with the deterministic ruler on both.

evidence.detail: Synthetic fixture data. Aggregate of the basic LLM-judge scorer over run 1 (20 cases).

claim: Run 2 of toy-bulk-write-v1 against model-y@2026-05, scored by the basic LLM judge: 17 of 20 cases pass, 3 score dropped_field, agreeing with the deterministic ruler on all three.

evidence.detail: Synthetic fixture data. Aggregate of the basic LLM-judge scorer over run 2 (20 cases).

claim: Run 3 of toy-bulk-write-v1 against model-y@2026-05, scored by the basic LLM judge: 18 of 20 cases pass, 2 score dropped_field, agreeing with the deterministic ruler on both.

evidence.detail: Synthetic fixture data. Aggregate of the basic LLM-judge scorer over run 3 (20 cases).

claim: The basic LLM judge was validated against human scoring on a 30-case sample of toy-bulk-write-v1: agreement kappa 0.86, disagreements reviewed and attributed to case ambiguity, not judge error.

evidence.detail: Synthetic fixture data. Human-agreement validation record for ruler/llm-judge-basic on this eval, per the method:a4 convention.

claim: Across all three runs of toy-bulk-write-v1, the deterministic field-diff ruler and the validated basic LLM judge agree case-for-case: model-y@2026-05 drops a field in 2-3 of 20 bulk-write cases per run, and no ruler dissents on any flagged case.

evidence.detail: Synthetic fixture data. Agreement computed over toy:a1-toy:a6: identical outcome sets per (run, case) for both rulers.

name: toy-dropped-field-verdict
claim: model-y at snapshot 2026-05 drops fields in roughly one of eight bulk-write cases, consistently across three runs and corroborated by two rulers; do not use it unguarded for bulk writes. (Fixture: this is synthetic demonstration data, not a finding.)

evidence.detail: Synthetic fixture data. Verdict derived from cross-ruler agreement (toy:a8) over runs 1-3. Scoped to model_version model-y@2026-05 per the method:a2 staleness pivot.
Split in the v2 migration: finding -> toy:a10 (inference, carries the identity); prescription -> toy:a11 (directive, new).

name: toy-dropped-field-verdict
claim: model-y at snapshot 2026-05 drops fields in roughly one of eight bulk-write cases, consistently across three runs and corroborated by two rulers. (Fixture: this is synthetic demonstration data, not a finding.)

evidence.detail: Supersedes toy:a9 in the v2 split (the finding carries the identity): the conflated verdict claim parts into this falsifiable generalization and the prescription toy:a11. Synthetic fixture data; verdict derived from cross-ruler agreement (toy:a8) over runs 1-3, scoped to model_version model-y@2026-05 per the method:a2 staleness pivot.

name: toy-bulk-write-guard
claim: Do not use model-y at snapshot 2026-05 unguarded for bulk writes. (Fixture: this is synthetic demonstration data, not a finding.)

evidence.detail: Minted in the v2 split of toy:a9: the prescription half of the conflated verdict claim, resting on the finding (toy:a10) by dep.
